name: nexus-qc-forms
description: Mobile QC Form Data Entry PWA - Factory floor quality control data collection

staging.name: Staging
staging.description: Staging environment for testing before production

VITE_CLERK_PUBLISHABLE_KEY.source: Clerk Dashboard -> API Keys -> Publishable Key

OPENAI_API_KEY.description: OpenAI API key for Whisper transcription (server-side only)

production.name: Production
production.description: Production environment for live factory floor usage

VITE_CLERK_PUBLISHABLE_KEY.source: Clerk Dashboard -> API Keys -> Publishable Key

VITE_CONVEX_URL.description: Convex production deployment URL (different from staging)

OPENAI_API_KEY.description: OpenAI API key for Whisper transcription (server-side only)

notes: Uses Coolify subdomain (*.sslip.io) - no custom domain required
Health check endpoint returns JSON for monitoring integration
Static assets served by nginx with long-term caching
SPA routing configured - all routes fall back to index.html
PWA service worker configured with no-cache headers
Two separate Convex deployments required (staging vs production)
